title: How to Remove Sweat Stains: The Complete Guide
meta_description: Learn how to remove sweat stains from clothes, hats, sheets, and mattresses using simple natural methods. Step-by-step tips that actually work.
image_prompt: Lifestyle photography, a bright airy laundry room scene showing a white cotton t-shirt laid flat on a clean white countertop beside a utility sink, with a visible yellow-tinged sweat stain at the armpit area as the clear focal subject, a small white cylindrical roll-on deodorant bottle with a flat white snap-on cap placed naturally to one side as a secondary element, a white ceramic bowl of baking soda with a wooden spoon resting beside it, and a neatly folded white hand towel nearby, the counter surface is smooth white laminate with a faint edge of a front-loading washing machine softly blurred in the background, warm natural light streaming in from a window above left casting soft even illumination across the scene, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
